transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, you're through to First National.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi, my card was declined this morning. I think it might be blocked?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Right, I can see there's a flag on the card.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: What kind of flag? Is it blocked?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's some kind of restriction. I'm not sure exactly what triggered it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'd need to escalate that probably. Some of these I can deal with, some I can't.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'll make a note. Someone may call you back within twenty-four to forty-eight hours.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: And in the meantime my card doesn't work.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You could use a different payment method.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I only have the one card.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see. Well let me try to escalate now...

planted_violations: unable to diagnose or resolve card block; failed to take definitive action
